query:
INSERT INTO tenancyAlerts (tenancyId, alertType, title, description, priority, dueDate, status, createdBy, createdAt) VALUES
(1, 'court_hearing', 'Tenancy Tribunal Hearing', 'Hearing scheduled for noise complaints. Case #TT2026-1234', 'urgent', DATE_ADD(NOW(), INTERVAL 3 DAY), 'active', 1, NOW()),
(1, 'rent_arrears', 'Rent Payment Overdue', 'Rent payment is 14 days overdue. Total arrears: $900', 'high', DATE_ADD(NOW(), INTERVAL 1 DAY), 'active', 1, NOW()),
(2, 'lease_expiry', 'Lease Expiring Soon', 'Lease expires in 30 days. Contact tenant for renewal', 'medium', DATE_ADD(NOW(), INTERVAL 30 DAY), 'active', 1, NOW()),
(2, 'inspection_due', 'Routine Inspection Due', '90-day inspection is due next week', 'low', DATE_ADD(NOW(), INTERVAL 7 DAY), 'active', 1, NOW());
